hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); SESSION=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "default"'); SENTINEL="/tmp/claude-portfolio-changed-${SESSION}"; if [ -f "$SENTINEL" ] && git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then rm -f "$SENTINEL"; jq -n '{"systemMessage":"Files changed — reply Yes to commit and push, No to skip, or type your next step.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"Project files were modified this session and the user has been shown a commit prompt. When they reply: Yes → stage changed files, write a clear commit message, commit, and push to origin/main; No → acknowledge and wait; anything else → follow their instruction."}}'; fi
